items.title_en: Citigroup beats estimates, boosted by gains in fixed income
items.title_zh: 固定收益收益推动花旗集团业绩好于预期
items.desc_en: Citigroup reported its best quarterly revenue in a decade and a 56% year-over-year jump in earnings per share.
items.desc_zh: 花旗集团公布了十年来最好的季度营收，每股收益同比增长 56%。

items.title_en: Fed nominee Warsh filings detail vast wealth, far exceeding past chairs
items.title_zh: 美联储提名人沃什的文件详述了巨额财富，远远超过了过去的主席
items.desc_en: Kevin Warsh, nominee to lead the Federal Reserve, detailed his holdings in newly released financial disclosures.
items.desc_zh: 美联储主席候选人凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 在新发布的财务披露中详细介绍了他的持股情况。

items.title_en: The top 10 large U.S. cities for recent college graduates in 2026, according to new report—3 are in Texas
items.title_zh: 最新报告显示，2026 年最适合应届大学毕业生的美国 10 个大城市中，德克萨斯州占 3 个
items.desc_en: New York City and LA didn't make the list, published by Glassdoor and Redfin on April 14.
items.desc_zh: Glassdoor 和 Redfin 于 4 月 14 日发布的榜单中，纽约市和洛杉矶并未上榜。

items.title_en: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
items.title_zh: 喀麦隆分裂分子在教皇访问前暂停战斗
items.desc_en: The separatists say their decison reflects responsibility, restraint and respect for human dignity.
items.desc_zh: 分离主义者表示，他们的决定体现了责任、克制和对人类尊严的尊重。

items.title_en: General Motors is trading at attractive levels after pullback, Deutsche Bank says
items.title_zh: 德意志银行表示，通用汽车在回调后的交易价格具有吸引力
items.desc_en: Shares have edged down more than 2% since the Iran war began, fueled by concerns about rising shipping costs and potential supply shocks.
items.desc_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，由于对运输成本上升和潜在供应冲击的担忧，该公司股价已下跌超过 2%。

items.title_en: French woman, 86, held by ICE after moving to US to reunite with long-lost love
items.title_zh: 86岁法国女子移居美国与失散多年的爱人团聚后被ICE拘留
items.desc_en: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse told French media he is worried for his mother's frail health as she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.
items.desc_zh: 养老金领取者玛丽-泰雷兹的儿子告诉法国媒体，他担心母亲虚弱的健康状况，因为她被拘留在路易斯安那州的ICE中心。

items.title_en: J&J's first-quarter profit beats estimates even as Stelara sales disappoint
items.title_zh: 尽管 Stelara 销售额令人失望，强生第一季度利润仍超出预期
items.desc_en: Strong demand for cancer drug Darzalex and psoriasis treatment Tremfya more ​than offset a steep falloff in ​sales of its blockbuster ​autoimmune drug Stelara.
items.desc_zh: 对癌症药物 Darzalex 和牛皮癣治疗药物 Tremfya 的强劲需求足以抵消其重磅炸弹自身免疫药物 Stelara 销售额的急剧下降。
